tldr_zh: Apple控訴OpenAI竊密、Anthropic研究AI感痛能力、微軟測試無廣告搜尋等重大科技動向發生。
tldr_en: Apple sues OpenAI for trade secrets theft; Anthropic researches AI pain perception; Microsoft tests ad-free Windows Search.

items.title_zh: Anthropic最新AI研究發現引關注，探討AI模型是否具備疼痛感知能力
items.title_en: Anthropic's Latest AI Research Explores Whether Models Can Feel Pain
items.summary_zh: Anthropic作為全球估值最高的AI公司（近1兆美元），近期發表引人瞩目的研究成果。該公司正在探索AI模型是否具備疼痛感知能力，這反映了對AI系統更深層特性的科學探討。Anthropic因發布前沿且深入的AI研究而聞名業界。
items.summary_en: Anthropic, the world's most valuable AI company with nearly $1 trillion valuation, has published intriguing research. The company is investigating whether AI models can experience pain, reflecting deeper scientific inquiry into AI system characteristics. Anthropic is known for publishing groundbreaking and thought-provoking AI research.

items.title_zh: Apple控訴OpenAI竊取商業機密，前員工利用漏洞下載機密檔案
items.title_en: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secrets Theft by Former Employee
items.summary_zh: Apple對OpenAI提起訴訟，指控前員工利用一個罕見的系統漏洞在離職後竊取機密文件。該訴狀指稱前Apple工程師在加入OpenAI後，仍能透過漏洞存取Apple網路，並下載敏感資料。這起案件涉及員工未授權訪問Apple系統和機密檔案外洩。
items.summary_en: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging a former employee exploited a rare security bug to download confidential files after leaving the company. The complaint claims the ex-engineer retained access to Apple's network and sensitive documents after joining OpenAI. The case involves unauthorized access to Apple's systems and alleged confidential data theft.

items.title_zh: Microsoft測試無廣告Windows 11搜尋功能，努力重獲使用者信任
items.title_en: Microsoft Tests Ad-Free Windows 11 Search to Win Back User Trust
items.summary_zh: 微軟推出簡化版Windows 11搜尋功能，移除推薦內容和廣告。該功能已向Windows Insiders實驗通道推出測試。微軟此舉旨在消除使用者不滿，透過改進搜尋體驗重建信任，反映公司對Windows用戶體驗的重視。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is testing a cleaner Windows 11 search menu that removes recommended content and ads. The decluttered search box is rolling out to Windows Insiders in the Experimental channel. This move aims to address user frustration and rebuild trust by improving the search experience.

items.title_zh: Apple發布iOS 27和watchOS 27公開測試版，Siri AI成重大亮點
items.title_en: Apple Releases iOS 27 Public Beta with AI-Powered Siri as Major Feature
items.summary_zh: Apple推出iOS 27和其他主要作業系統的公開測試版，今秋正式發布。今年最大新功能是Siri AI，一套經過延遲推出的AI驅動Siri改造方案。該功能實際運作良好，雖然保持簡潔風格，但已展現強大能力，特別在Apple Watch上表現出色。
items.summary_en: Apple has released public betas for iOS 27 and other major OS updates launching this fall. The biggest new feature is Siri AI, a long-delayed AI-powered Siri revamp. It works effectively and keeps things concise, with particularly strong performance on Apple Watch for wrist-based computing.

items.title_zh: OnePlus傳將退出美國和歐洲市場，結束多月市場猜測
items.title_en: OnePlus Reportedly Exiting US and European Markets
items.summary_zh: OnePlus及其母公司Oppo計劃在近日宣布OnePlus品牌退出美國和歐洲市場。此舉將結束數月來關於OnePlus未來的各種傳聞。此退出決定對全球智慧手機市場格局產生重大影響。
items.summary_en: OnePlus and parent company Oppo are reportedly planning to announce the exit of OnePlus from US and European markets in the coming days. This move would conclude months of speculation about OnePlus's future market presence and significantly impact global smartphone landscape.

items.title_zh: 視訊生成新創PixVerse融資4.39億美元，估值突破20億美元
items.title_en: Video Generation Startup PixVerse Raises $439M, Valuation Exceeds $2B
items.summary_zh: 新加坡視訊生成新創公司PixVerse完成C輪延伸融資，融資額達4.39億美元。該公司擁有1500萬月活躍用戶，估值已突破20億美元。PixVerse的快速融資和估值增長反映了視訊生成AI技術的強勁市場需求。
items.summary_en: Singapore-based video generation startup PixVerse closed a Series C extension round raising $439 million at a valuation exceeding $2 billion. The company boasts 15 million monthly active users. PixVerse's rapid funding and valuation growth reflect strong market demand for AI video generation technology.

items.title_zh: AI代理軟體Nous Research融資談判進行中，估值達15億美元
items.title_en: Hermes AI Agent Maker Nous Research Raises Funding at $1.5B Valuation
items.summary_zh: AI代理軟體製造商Nous Research正進行新一輪融資談判，估值達15億美元。該輪融資至少7500萬美元，由Robot Ventures領投，並獲得USV等頂級投資者參與。Nous Research的融資動向反映了AI代理市場的火熱程度。
items.summary_en: AI agent maker Nous Research is in funding talks at a $1.5 billion valuation, raising at least $75 million led by Robot Ventures with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors. The funding reflects strong market momentum in the AI agent space.

items.title_zh: Satya Nadella對使用AI企業發出警告，關注專有模型隱患
items.title_en: Satya Nadella Issues Warning to Companies Using Proprietary AI Models
items.summary_zh: 微軟CEO Satya Nadella對企業使用專有AI模型提出警告。他表示關鍵擔憂是販售專有模型的大型AI實驗室可能像木馬一樣行動。此警告反映對AI供應鏈安全和企業依賴的深層思考。
items.summary_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has warned companies using AI to be cautious about proprietary models. His key concern is that giant AI labs selling proprietary models may act as Trojan horses. This warning reflects deeper concerns about AI supply chain security and corporate dependence.

items.title_zh: 美軍連續三晚空襲伊朗，川普宣布對霍莫茲海峽商船徵費
items.title_en: US Launches Third Consecutive Night of Strikes on Iran; Trump Announces Strait Toll
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普宣布美軍連續第三晚對伊朗發動空襲。川普並宣布美國將對所有通過荷莫茲海峽的船隻徵收運載貨物價值20%的費用作為維安補償，同時恢復對伊朗港口的海上封鎖。此舉升級美伊地緣政治緊張局勢。
items.summary_en: US President Trump announced the military conducted a third consecutive night of strikes on Iran. Trump also announced the US will charge 20% of cargo value for ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz as security compensation and will resume blockade of Iranian ports. This escalates US-Iran tensions.
